description: Configure the 'Sustainable Workspace' product collection by creating a new eCommerce Category named 'Sustainable Workspace'. The 'Bamboo Standing Desk' must be assigned to this category, published on the website with a 'New!' ribbon, and configured with 'Motorized Bamboo Desk' as an alternative product (upsell) and 'Cable Management Box' as an accessory product (cross-sell). The 'Recycled Paper Organizer' should also be assigned to the 'Sustainable Workspace' category but must remain unpublished.
